title: stylidium lithophilum
intro: Stylidium lithophilum, also known as the rock triggerplant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stylidium lithophilum include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and preventing infections, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antiviral agent. Stylidium lithophilum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote wound healing and support overall health.
